message:
feat(layout): add sequence note + fragment layout geometry

Compute layout positions for sequence diagram notes and interaction
fragments, completing the layout pipeline for these features:

Notes (LayoutSequenceNote):
- LeftOf: positioned to the left of the first participant
- RightOf: positioned to the right of the last participant
- Over: centered spanning across listed participants
- Width scales for multi-participant "over" notes
- Y-position derived from note index in message sequence

Fragments (LayoutSequenceFragment):
- Full-width boxes spanning all participants with padding
- Start/end y-positions from fragment edge indices
- Kind and label preserved for renderer styling (loop/alt/par/etc.)
- Minimum height enforced for very short fragments

Both are stored in LayoutExtensions and available to all renderers.
The parser already captures notes and fragments into IrSequenceMeta;
this connects the layout pipeline so renderers can visualize them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
